facebook.caption:
3,794 reviews. 4.8 stars. On the main strip of Trần Hưng Đạo.

FIONA SPA keeps showing up for a reason. Full-body massage after a long beach day, and you walk out a different person. Consistent therapists, clean rooms, and zero upsell pressure.

Book ahead. It fills up fast, especially evenings.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
